app_subtitle: Chat with your documents in multiple Indian languages
upload_help: Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT files (supports 1000+ pages)
indexing_in_progress: Indexing documents... this may take a while for large collections.
no_documents_warning: Please upload and index documents first.
no_files_warning: Please select at least one file to upload.
chat_input_placeholder: Ask a question about your documents...
summary_placeholder: Click the button to generate a summary of all uploaded documents.
insights_placeholder: Click the button to extract key insights from your documents.
clause_input_placeholder: Enter a clause, policy, or section to search for...
clause_placeholder: Enter a topic above to find related clauses and sections.
no_context_available: No context retrieved yet. Ask a question first.
welcome_message: Upload documents and click 'Index Documents' to get started.
error_no_api_key: GOOGLE_API_KEY not found. Please set it in your .env file.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
footer_text: Built with LangChain, FAISS, and Gemini 2.5 Flash
